tests.covers: AC-1: GET /widgets/export returns the first 50 widgets when no page_size parameter is supplied.
tests.expected: HTTP status is 200 and body.json parses as a JSON array of exactly 50 widget objects, each with the fields id, status, and created_at.

tests.covers: AC-2: GET /widgets/export returns 400 Bad Request when page_size exceeds 500.
tests.expected: HTTP status is 400 and body.json contains an error object with error.code == 'page_size_over_limit'.
